title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
Business Taxes
Business Taxes is an application on the
PaymentStream
â¢ Direct platform that allows authorized users to submit CRA files and business tax payments to Central 1.
Client Centre
The Client Centre is a digital portal that provides secured access to Central 1âs applications and to information and news about our products and services.
Client Centre Users
Client Centre Users log in to the Client Centre to access certain applications. Client Centre Users canât manage CPS Admin Security Officers or other Client Centre Users.
CPS Admin
The Central Portal System (CPS) Admin tool is used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
CPS Admin Security Officers
CPS Admin Security Officers use the CPS Admin or the User Management application to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. They can also delete and modify other CPS Admin Security Officers (with some exceptions) via the User Management application. CPS Admin Security Officers use the Client Centre to log in to certain applications.
PaymentStreamâ¢
Direct
PaymentStream
Direct is a user interface that provides access to Payments products,
MemberDirect
Â®
system support features, and related administration functions via a single sign-on to the Client Centre.
User Management
User Management is an application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. It is also used to edit and delete other CPS Admin Security Officers and to manage 2-step security tokens. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin.
END
